name: Mutually Affured Destruction
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>相</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>視</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>相</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>殺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Mutual Inspections that Cancel Each Other
desc: Both players must keep their hands revealed this turn. While their hands are revealed by this effect, if they both have a card with the same name in their hands, neither player can activate cards with that name, or their effects.
eff: Both players must keep their hands revealed this turn. While their hands are revealed by this effect, if they both have a card with the same name in their hands, neither player can activate cards with that name, or their effects.
